## Research, recognition and the latest from Delft Circuits.
## // Events
## Upcoming events
Advanced technologies demand I/O that scales without compromise. So we built it — superconducting, integrated, reliable. Every system designed, manufactured and tested in-house from Delft.

## In the news
From peer-reviewed benchmarking studies to international press coverage — our technology is validated by independent research and recognized across the quantum industry.
![Cryogenic I/O below vacuum feedthrough of cryostat](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/ring-with-tabbis-below-crown-1-1024x683.jpg)
## HAVIK Project Update: Advancing Quantum Performance Together
Update on EU co-funded HAVIK project 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/havik-project-cryogenic-io-two-qubit-fidelity/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/4-1024x1024.png)
## Delft Circuits Appoints Karen Keenan as COO
## Delft Circuits Appoints Karen Keenan as COO to Scale Quantum I/O Hardware Manufacturing for Global Customers
Maarten Hendriks to Lead Quantum Fab and Infrastructure Expansion 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/delft-circuits-appoints-karen-keenan-coo/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/P1019424_Martin_november-2025-1-1024x1024-1.jpg)
## Delft Circuits Appoints Martin Danoesastro as CEO & Announces New Financing
Delft, Netherlands 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/delft-circuits-appoints-martin-danoesastro-as-ceo-announces-new-financing/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/P1017434HD-SMP-on-probe_august-2025-Recovered-1024x683-1.jpg)
## Delft Circuits and Bluefors Join Forces 
Scalable Quantum I/O for Next-Generation Quantum Computers 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/delft-circuits-and-bluefors-join-forces/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/P1019617_HD-SMP-1024x683.jpg)
## Delft Circuits Presents its I/O Roadmap
Roadmap for Scaling Quantum Computers towards Thousands of Qubits 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/delft-circuits-presents-its-i-o-roadmap/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/picture-1014997_HD-SMP_2025-1024x1024-1.jpg)
## Delft Circuits unveils big step in solving quantum utility scalability bottleneck
Launched at the APS Global Physics Summit 2025 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/integrated-photonic-systems-demand-integrated-i-o/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/formfactor-logo-square-1.png)
## FormFactor Partners with Delft Circuits
Enhancing Scalability and Performance with High-Density Cryogenic Cabling Solutions 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/precision-measurement-at-scale/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/3-1024x1024.png)
## Delft Circuits Appoints Robby Ferdinandus as Global Chief Commercial Officer
Following recent key hires in marketing and sales, Delft Circuits appoints Ferdinandus to lead next phase of global expansion. 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/dc_news_article/scaling-qubit-counts-without-compromise/)
## Research and proof
Independent validation of what we build.
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/P1015454_Groove-T2B-april-2025-1-1024x683.jpg)
## Case study
## Groove Quantum
## Cri/oFlex® validation for Spin Qubits
Delft Circuits simulates and manufactures the control lines for spin qubits. 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/research-proof/cri-oflex-validation-for-spin-qubits/)
![](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/1daac7adef1cbc6146865ad6e61dce9cfd0d6358-1024x683.jpg)
## Benchmarking
## With KIT
## Cri/oFlex® thermalization order of magnitude faster compared to conventional semi-rigid coax cables
Cri/oFlex® enables increase in cabling density without thermally overloading cryostats. 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/research-proof/flex-thermalization-enables-order-of-magnitude-gains/)
![Cryogenic I/O below vacuum feedthrough of cryostat](https://delft-circuits.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/ring-with-tabbis-below-crown-1-1024x683.jpg)
## Benchmarking
## With Bluefors
## Cri/oFlex® Microwave Drive line performance matches coaxial standards
Cri/oFlex® shows no significant difference with coaxial drive line configuration within the natural fluctuations over time. 
[ Read more ](https://delft-circuits.com/research-proof/drive-line-performance-matches-coaxial-standards/)
## Let's pioneer together
Ready to push the boundaries of what quantum can do?
